name: Clean
description: Professional, understated visual language. Subtle shadows, rounded corners, thin borders, smooth motion. No gradients, no glass, no glow. Closest to the shadcn/Tailwind aesthetic — universally appropriate.

decorators.cl-card: Clean card with subtle shadow and rounded corners. Standard elevated container.
decorators.cl-divider: Thin border divider with muted color. Use between sections.
decorators.cl-section: Padded section wrapper with optional muted background.
decorators.cl-muted-bg: Soft muted background for contrast sections. Apply to alternating page sections.
decorators.cl-badge-dot: Small status dot before badge text. Minimal status indicator.
decorators.cl-subtle-hover: Smooth hover background transition. For list items and nav links.

panel.description: Clean panel with shadow and rounded corners.

card.description: Standard card with subtle shadow. No extra decoration needed — clean style tokens handle the look.

kpi.description: KPI metric in a simple bordered card.

table.description: DataTable in a bordered container with clean header.

form.description: Form in a card with clean layout.

sidebar.description: Clean sidebar with muted background and simple nav items.

layout.description: Full page layout with sidebar and content area. Light background, no visual effects.

alert.description: Standard Alert — clean tokens handle the styling.

modal.description: Standard Modal with clean styling — no extra decoration needed.

chart.description: Chart in bordered container with clean header.
